text.title: Product Hunt Launch System Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Product Hunt Launch System. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Build pre-launch email list ≥500 subscribers committed to upvote launch day. <500 = no top-10 chance.
rule.rationale: Below 500 the launch competes against established players with 5000+ pre-lists.

rule.statement: Hunter has ≥1000 followers AND niche overlap. Generic hunters under-deliver.
rule.rationale: Generic hunters bring 10x less traffic than niche-aligned ones.

rule.statement: Launch 12:01 AM PT Tuesday-Thursday. Other windows split attention with rolling launches.
rule.rationale: Off-window launches face 30-50% more competition for top-5 spot.

rule.statement: Reply to every comment within 1 hour for the first 12 hours; PH algorithm rewards engagement velocity.
Gallery (≥4 images), gif (≤4MB), tagline (≤60 chars), FAQ (5 Q&A) before launch day — late assets miss the morning push.
rule.rationale: Missing assets at launch reduce CTR ≥40%.

rule.statement: Zero paid / botted upvotes; PH detects + ghosts the launch.
rule.rationale: Paid upvote rings are detected + the launch is hidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-growth-product-hunt-launch.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
